LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NORTH EAST MEDICAL SERVICES' ANTI-SLAPP MOTION TO STRIKE THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD IS GRANTED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-15-2026 CONTINUED TO SEP-16-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
